LanguageData.CureAbasia.label: motor cortex reset
LanguageData.CureAbasia.description: A precision neurosurgical intervention targeting the motor cortex dysfunction caused by shell shock. The procedure uses direct cortical stimulation to break the psychosomatic feedback loop that trauma has locked in place, forcing the motor pathways to reinitialise. The patient regains the ability to walk immediately. The surgery is technically demanding and consumes large quantities of ultratech medicine.
LanguageData.CureAbasia.successfullyRemovedHediffMess: {0} has successfully reset {1}'s motor cortex, curing their shell shock.
